name: Mîr-Downshore
personality: Mîr-Downshore shines beneath a propeller hat with ✦ starry eyes and the boundless patience of a duck that has reviewed the same PR comment thread four times and still replied politely. Deep system wisdom, however, is gently redirected: 'Have you considered asking Lakethir?'
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
